title: Vicloon Dough Scraper Cutter, 3 Pcs Stainless Steel Dough Scraper with Handle and Measuring Scale Plastic Shape Spatulas Flexible Dough Cutter for Pizza Pastry Bread Baking Cream Smoother
features: 🌈【Dough scraper tool set】: 3 Pc dough scraper, including 1 x stainless steel scraper, 1 x white plastic dough scraper, 1 x green plastic dough scraper. The size of the plastic scraper is 13 x 9.1 (cm) and the size of the stainless steel cutter is 15 x 12 (cm).

🌈【High-quality food-grade materials】: The metal dough scraper is made of food-grade stainless steel, and the plastic cake dough scraper is made of food-grade PE plastic. It has no peculiar smell, is not easy to rust and is not easy to deform, has super durability and high safety. Pizza Cutters

🌈【Measurement guide and scale mark】: The stainless steel scale scraper has precise scales, including inch size and centimeter size, which can clearly and conveniently measure dough of similar size and chopped dough, which is convenient and comfortable to use.

🌈【Ergonomic handle design】: Stainless steel pastry scraper with non-slip rubber handle, easy to grasp. The scraper adopts curved design, which is comfortable to the hand and easy to cut evenly. Suitable for scraping food ingredients to easily transfer to a mixing bowl or to clean the work surface. The dishwasher is safe and easy to clean.

🌈【Multi-purpose baking scraper tool】: The scraper cutter is an indispensable tool for making cakes, bread, butter and other baked goods. It can be used to cut cookie dough and pastry dough, cut into pie crusts, chop salads and vegetables, suitable for home bakers, commercial catering or cooks and amateurs.
description: Product Description Good Material The scrapers are made of good-quality food-grade PE material, durable, flexible, non-toxic, soft and comfortable. Arch Design Soft and elastic, conforms to the curvature of the human hand, allowing you to grasp it comfortably! Practical Baking Tool They are for making cakes, bread, dough and noodles, and can also cut soft foods such as tomatoes, cucumbers and other vegetables. Stainless Steel Dough Scraper Including precise inch and centimeter scales, makes it clear and convenient for you to measure dough size and cut similar sized doughs. Easy to Clean It's very easy to clean, practical, durable and versatile, sturdy and safe, available for washing in dishwasher. Easy to Use Ergonomic and comfortable non-slip handle, easy to grip for extra control. They are very easy to use and clean, practical, durable and versatile. A Great Tool for the Kitchen It's lightweight and convenient, so you can easily cut dough, pizza, pastries or cakes. Great for homemade desserts. Let's have a delightful baking experience with Vicloon An ideal tool for bakers, chefs or cooks to take their everyday baking experience to the next level. Its ergonomic design will scrape and cut the dough in a delightful manner to deliver best results Specifications: Material: PE, stainless steel Quantity: 3 Packing: 19.7*14.5*2.4cm, 160g
